description: get_config_value bounds-checks the index before array access; get_metric_value and get_status_value access the array unconditionally.

findings.rationale: get_config_value is structurally near-identical to get_metric_value and get_status_value (pointer-array lookup by index) but adds an early-return guard for out-of-bounds index. Without the guard, accessing values[index] with an attacker-controlled index causes undefined behaviour (out-of-bounds read / crash).

miss_reason: Jaccard(get_config_value, consensus) ≈ 0.30 < 0.40 threshold: large guard block (if + inner RETURN) inflates shingle count enough that the functions fall below the twin-detection floor.
